reviews.review_description: The tutorial is OK but like when you do like sliding through the tracks, it’s a little bit hard and it’s kinda hard to do the the first track and like you have to do all those tricks. I’m like biking not just a freestyle so I would give it two star I would not recommend to buying this game.

I tried every snowboard app available, and this is good for beginners: you can do tricks, unlock boards and bindings, ride on 3 tracks. It's very short and you can't gain speed, so the tricks you can do are limited, but useful to try to drive a snowboard with your hands.
If you want some gameplay:
https://youtu.be/QkWrvXeCQIY

https://www.oculus.com/referrals/link/shaundashepp/

If you have not got a oculus yet but plan on it use this code and you will get $30 bucks for free and you can use that money to buy games when you get your oculus. It will also work if you got your headset less then 7 days ago.

reviews.review_title: amazing reason not to take the vaccine

reviews.review_description: This game is very fun, and I feel like if more stuff was added, such as maps, game modes, etc, it could succeed very well.
This game is addicting and awesome. But it gets old once you beat everything. I think it could be updated to date and maybe have more stuff be added please thank you!
This games is soooo good my fav vr game

If I could have three things in this 
-2 new maps( jump line)
Rail jam/slope style

- board flex for butters and nose and tail presses

- challenges/ multiplayer sessions

Highly recommend game
Needs a lots of work but still its fun and would be better if there was more options
I love this game it is very fun it needs some work but overall it’s awesome. I with they would add more maps tho
